  <title>Release notes from sqlite-vec</title>
  <updated>2026-05-18T06:50:43Z</updated>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/789538509/v0.1.10-alpha.4</id>
    <updated>2026-05-18T06:54:24Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/asg017/sqlite-vec/releases/tag/v0.1.10-alpha.4"/>
    <title>v0.1.10-alpha.4</title>
    <content type="html"><ul>
<li>Fix bug that made <code>ALTER TABLE RENAME</code> to fail on <code>vec0</code> that use the new ivf/diskann features - thanks <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/rolf-moz/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/rolf-moz">@rolf-moz</a>!</li>
<li>Fix a cached statement bug on DiskANN that caused statements to not clean up properly</li>
</ul></content>
    <author>
      <name>asg017</name>
    </author>
    <media:thumbnail height="30" width="30" url="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/15178711?s=60&v=4"/>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/789538509/v0.1.10-alpha.3</id>
    <updated>2026-04-01T06:41:04Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/asg017/sqlite-vec/releases/tag/v0.1.10-alpha.3"/>
    <title>v0.1.10-alpha.3</title>
    <content type="html"><p>Proper <code>INSERT OR REPLACE INTO</code> support.</p></content>
    <author>
      <name>asg017</name>
    </author>
    <media:thumbnail height="30" width="30" url="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/15178711?s=60&v=4"/>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/789538509/v0.1.10-alpha.2</id>
    <updated>2026-04-01T06:14:27Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/asg017/sqlite-vec/releases/tag/v0.1.10-alpha.2"/>
    <title>v0.1.10-alpha.2</title>
    <content type="html"><ul>
<li>Various bug fixes, unit tests, and integration test across flat/ANN indexes</li>
<li>New "insert command" structure similar to FTS5 commands, for rescore/DiskANN parameter updates</li>
<li>Fix data leaking via un-deleted compressed neighbor vectors in DiskANN. This causes DELETEs to be quite expensive, but something we can fix in a later release.</li>
<li><code>ALTER TABLE RENAME</code> support</li>
</ul></content>
    <author>
      <name>asg017</name>
    </author>
    <media:thumbnail height="30" width="30" url="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/15178711?s=60&v=4"/>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/789538509/v0.1.10-alpha.1</id>
    <updated>2026-03-31T08:34:26Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/asg017/sqlite-vec/releases/tag/v0.1.10-alpha.1"/>
    <title>v0.1.10-alpha.1</title>
    <content type="html"><p>Initial alpha release of <code>sqlite-vec</code> with new ANN indexes: rescore, ivf (experimental, not enabled), and DiskANN.</p>
